release_card.summary: 0.0.11-pre is a walking skeleton plus follow-up hardening release with concise Codex App/CLI transcript fallback, MCP app-panel border/render metadata, near-native app artifact dashboard fallback, LongWay checklist and planned-row subagent/model/reasoning projection, compact subagent lifecycle events, diagnostic smoke routing, completed diagnostic fan-in closure, optional Tolaria mirrors, and branch consolidation recorded.
documented_flow: concise boxed CCC LongWay transcript status block
subagent activity, task ownership, and configured model projection
planned-row subagent/model/reasoning projection in transcript and Markdown artifacts
compact opened/running/completed/closed-style subagent lifecycle transcript events
PLAN_SEQUENCE uses the configured way/tactician model rather than the host conversation model
optional Tolaria graph and memory mirrors
validation: source repo main pushed at f8eeb7f
cargo test -p ccc passed with 224 tests
release-target cargo build passed for darwin arm64, darwin x86_64, linux arm64, linux x86_64, and windows x86_64 using rustup cargo/rustc; Linux targets used Zig linker wrappers
app-panel payload/text test proves subagent activity names child agent, role, configured model, variant, lane, task, lifecycle status, and next action
app-panel payload/text test proves concise boxed CCC LongWay transcript fallback and planned-row subagent/model/reasoning fallback are rendered
PLAN_SEQUENCE regression proves the planning task uses way/tactician role_config_snapshot and runtime_dispatch model/variant
subagent-update text smoke proves compact lifecycle output omits noisy follow-up commands
MCP app-panel resource exposes text/html;profile=mcp-app and ui.prefersBorder metadata for hosts that render component resources
app-panel artifact smoke created run-local CCC_LONGWAY_PANEL.md/json and workspace-level CCC_LATEST_PANEL.md/json
extracted darwin arm64 tarball binary prints concise boxed CCC LongWay text with planned-row routing and compact subagent lifecycle text
task-card fan-in resolve regression proves completed smoke runs close instead of staying active/await_fan_in
branch cleanup leaves only main and origin/main
darwin arm64, darwin x86_64, linux arm64, linux x86_64, and windows x86_64 tarballs refreshed on 2026-05-04 from f8eeb7f
macOS packaged binaries report 0.0.11-pre; Linux and Windows assets are package-verifiable on macOS but require native host validation
